fullDescription:
Bring the magic of the moon into your home with our Custom Photo Moon Lamp – a stunning, personalized night light that captures your most cherished memories. Crafted from eco-friendly PLA filament and featuring a warm LED module, this 5.5-inch (14cm) diameter lamp sits on a sleek wooden base, creating a dreamy ambiance in any room.

**How It Works:**
1. **Upload Your Photo or Coordinates** – Share your favorite image or special location coordinates.
2. **3D Printing & Assembly** – We meticulously 3D print your design, embed the LED, and mount it on a wooden base.
3. **Delivery in 5-7 Days** – Your custom lamp is carefully packaged and shipped.

**Why You’ll Love It:**
- **Sentimental Gift** – Perfect for anniversaries, birthdays, weddings, or just because.
- **Versatile Decor** – Ideal for bedrooms, living rooms, nurseries, or offices.
- **Eco-Friendly & Safe** – Made from sustainable PLA filament with a cool-to-touch LED.

**Specifications:**
- Material: PLA filament, LED module, wooden base
- Size: 5.5 inches (14 cm) diameter
- Production Time: 5-7 business days
- Customization: Upload photo or coordinates

Illuminate your world with a lamp that tells your story. Order your Custom Photo Moon Lamp today and make every night a little more magical!
